details: The agent reported 20 labels but the known fact is approximately 124 labels. The agent used an indirect approach (sampling issues to extract labels) instead of using a direct list_labels endpoint, and stopped after only ~900 issues out of 21,395+ open issues and 12,627 closed issues. The sampling approach severely undercounted the labels - the agent found only 20 when there are approximately 124. The agent acknowledged the limitation but still reported an incorrect count as the final answer.
